prompt: I have a Button inside a hero section with a purple background using var(--Primary-FG-Bold), but the button text is invisible — it's the same color as the background. I'm not using the Surface component. What's going wrong and how do I fix it?

assertions.name: identifies-missing-surface
assertions.description: Correctly identifies the root cause: using a raw div with background color doesn't trigger token remapping via [data-surface]

assertions.name: recommends-surface-component
assertions.description: Recommends using <Surface mode='fg-bold'> as the fix (not just setting data-surface manually)

assertions.name: explains-bold-inversion
assertions.description: Explains bold inversion — that <Surface> triggers CSS remapping which flips text to white and adjusts button fills to remain visible on bold surfaces

assertions.name: shows-correct-code
assertions.description: Includes a corrected code example using <Surface mode='fg-bold'> wrapping the Button
